标题: GR Factory's new Blancpain classic series full calendar moon phase watch features a white and rose gold stepped case, combining simplicity with a sense of depth. The elegant dial with concentric circles layout is easy to read, with raised Roman numeral hour markers on the periphery and an inner circle for calendar indications. The watch includes skeletonized leaf hands, a large logo second hand, and a blue steel calendar hand, each serving its purpose. Equipped with an automatic winding movement with a power reserve of up to hours, the watch features discreet adjustment buttons cleverly integrated into the lugs for both convenience and aesthetic balance. The moon phase display by Blancpain has been a topic of conversation among watch enthusiasts, with its playful resemblance to emoji expressions. More than just a timekeeping tool, this watch is a wearable art piece that showcases the wearer's sophistication and can be a focal point in both business and casual settings.

Blancpain Fifty Fathoms "Barracuda" watch is known as the pinnacle of beauty in the Blancpain collection. The black dial features aged red and beige markings, with a bubble-shaped sapphire crystal and rotating blue sapphire bezel that exude a warm glow in sunlight. The faithful reproduction includes a rubber strap with fabric texture and stainless steel buckle. With a 40mm diameter, water resistance up to 300 meters, and Caliber movement, this watch is precise and meticulously detailed. Resembling the Rolex Submariner series in size, it is suitable for most people and boasts strong luminescence in a beautiful green hue, earning it the title of the most beautiful Barracuda watch among enthusiasts. Feel free to share.

TW exclusive release. The Poison series by Bao Po features the BA Deep Diver Flyback Chronograph, showcasing extraordinary elegance in a low-key manner. It is equipped with imported blue light sapphire glass that is scratch-resistant. The watch uses an imported movement, modified original F automatic mechanical movement, with calendar window size and color matching the original version perfectly. Diameter: .mm. The jewel bearings on the balance wheel are consistent with the original, ensuring pure color and authenticity. The integrated balance wheel not only enhances the appearance but also provides better protection for the movement, ensuring stability. The balance wheel undergoes grinding and chamfering for months to prevent copper shavings from falling into the movement and causing it to stop. The dial features a matching calendar size and % Swiss-imported C luminous material, offering brightness and longevity comparable to genuine products. Waterproof rating tested to % three degrees.

Unique craftsmanship: Blancpain Fifty Fathoms series wristwatch, featuring a stainless steel metal case with a sapphire crystal bezel (authentic). The ultra-thin case is meticulously crafted with CNC technology, and the elegant lugs provide a comfortable fit. The watch embodies the spirit of excellence in craftsmanship, faithfully replicating the authentic style. The movement is precise, the strap is made of imported American calfskin for softness and breathability. The hands are finely crafted, enhancing the overall quality. The blue Geneva wave dial is made with a low-temperature firing process, ensuring color permanence, and Swiss vintage super luminous material. The finished product offers options for solid or transparent case backs. A dedication to craftsmanship and quality!

Blancpain Moon Beauty natural mother-of-pearl women's watch, JB women's full calendar moon phase watch mm. TwT Factory hires master watchmakers who have undergone countless tests over two years, damaging over a hundred movements in the process. They meticulously restore the authentic watchmaking characteristics, from the day of the week, moon phase, to the calendar and month, to showcase its timeless charm in the same way! The new watch features two windows at the twelve o'clock position displaying the day of the week and month. The sub-dial at the clock position can read the moon phase, the middle circle indicates the date, and the edge shows the time. Original size mm, front and back of the watch are made of sapphire crystal glass, the strap is made of imported crocodile leather, and the buckle is an original folding clasp made of the same material as the case. The movement is equipped with a custom cal. automatic winding movement, ensuring the highest level of authenticity. TwT watches allow you to own genuine products at a low price! Actions speak louder than words, and if you like it, it's worth it! TwT products are always exquisite, welcome to appreciate them!

Exclusive Blancpain Fifty Fathoms men's watch in high-tech satin grey ceramic with a lustrous finish, high hardness, colorfastness, stain resistance, and durability. The watch features a toothed bezel for a strong 3D effect, non-fading, smooth touch that is gentle on the skin. The crown is meticulously engraved with superb craftsmanship. The satin ceramic buckle is meticulously polished inside and out, with the pin tip featuring multi-faceted chamfering for perfect replication of authentic details. The movement uses a precise Hangzhou movement modified to Blancpain's Cal. movement, with jewel bearings matching the original color for authenticity. The integrated jewel bearing is finely polished and chamfered to prevent copper shavings from falling into the movement and causing it to stop. The dial features a date window, Swiss-imported C3 luminous material for long-lasting brightness comparable to the original. Water resistance tested to 30 meters. High-quality craftsmanship. Feel free to share!

Retro Style: Blancpain's new Ait Command Air Force Commander series AC, a legendary chronograph with a retro design faithful to historical traditions and blending vintage style with Blancpain's high watchmaking craftsmanship from the last century! The titanium case has a diameter of mm, with long lugs brushed on the front and sides, and polished edges consistent with the authentic piece. Equipped with a Dan Dong chronograph movement modified FB movement for precise timekeeping, replicating all details of the original. The bidirectional rotating bezel is polished ceramic with luminous markings. The dial features dual sub-dials for minute and hour chronograph, large luminous numerals, and syringe hands. The tachymeter and chronograph scales are on the edge of the dial. The original brushed clasp is paired with a vintage blue leather strap, exuding a full retro vibe.
